extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the “Against our Company” and “Against our Subsidiaries” rows for the requested group metrics, excluding all “By” rows and excluding promoter, director and group-company personal matters from the aggregate amount. Criminal proceedings against the company and subsidiaries are Nil (0), statutory/regulatory proceedings against them are Nil (0), and tax proceedings against them total 1 + 11 = 12; quantified group amounts are ₹310.15 lakh for the Company plus ₹458.13 lakh for Subsidiaries, totaling ₹768.28 lakh, or ₹7.6828 crore, excluding stated interest. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated “Total” of ₹2,273.79 lakh as of September 30, 2023, converted to ₹22.7379 crore; it was not re-summed from line items. The disclosure gives a company-wide largest-customer concentration of 59.47% of revenue from operations for Fiscal 2023, but does not disclose top-five or top-ten customer percentages; the other percentages for BC and E-Governance are business-segment figures and are not used. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ lakhs, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
